architectureDecisions.label: Full snapshot on updated
architectureDecisions.rationale: planning.phase_note.updated carries complete note row plus refs array for simple deterministic replay.

architectureDecisions.label: Separate suggestion events
architectureDecisions.rationale: phase_note_task_suggestions sync via planning.phase_note_suggestion.created/updated/removed; note events carry refs only.

readyReview.decision: Full snapshot note updates; suggestions via separate planning.phase_note_suggestion.* events.

technicalBreakdown: Define planning.phase_note.created, updated, archived with full-row payloads and refs array.
Define planning.phase_note_suggestion.created, updated, removed for harvest rows.
Implement applier for phase_notes, phase_note_refs, phase_note_task_suggestions.
Wire publish hooks on phase journal and suggestion mutation commands.
Add unit and hydrate tests for note + suggestion event streams.

acceptanceCriteria: Phase note create/update/archive mutations publish planning.phase_note.* events under git-event-log authority.
Suggestion row mutations publish planning.phase_note_suggestion.* events (separate from note payloads).
Hydrate replays phase notes, refs, and suggestions identically on a fresh projection.
Idempotency keys prevent duplicate rows on replay for both note and suggestion commands.
